texto: You may pray to God to remove the hills on your way and fill every pothole on your path
autor: but don’t be surprised if God gives you a shovel to do so!
explicacao: Citação de but don’t be surprised if God gives you a shovel to do so! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You may pray to God to remove the hills on your way and fill every pothole on your path” articula reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, remove em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
